title: rubus × separabilis
intro: Rubus × separabilis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the Rubus idaeus (wild raspberry) and Rubus fruticosus (bramble). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus × separabilis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Rubus × separabilis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
